TextView.android:text:
Exercise Routines

1. Morning Jog
A 20-minute jog to boost energy and burn calories.

2. Push-Ups
Strengthens chest, shoulders, and triceps.

3. Squats
Builds lower body strength and improves posture.

4. Jumping Jacks
A full-body warm-up to raise your heart rate.

5. Plank
Core exercise to improve stability and endurance.

6. Lunges
Targets thighs and glutes for better balance.

7. Cycling
Low-impact cardio great for legs and stamina.

8. Yoga Stretches
Improves flexibility and reduces stress.

9. Dumbbell Curls
Strengthens biceps and improves arm tone.

10. Jump Rope
Fun and effective full-body cardio workout.
